name: Permanent damage from work ladder fall, what benefits?
description: PPD payout based on % impairment—up to hundreds K.

mainEntity.name: Permanent damage from work ladder fall, what benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: PPD payout based on % impairment—up to hundreds K.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Permanent partial disability (PPD)** rating x body part value; e.g., leg 20% = $30K+.[6][7]

Impairment schedule in statutes.

- IME doctor rates.
- Lump sum possible.

Max total disability rare.
